name: United Club℠ Visa Infinite Card

welcome_offer.description: 100,000 bonus United miles after spending $5,000 in first 3 months + 10,000 additional miles when adding authorized user

other_benefits.name: United Club Membership
other_benefits.description: United Club all-access membership — unlimited entry to United Club lounges worldwide and Star Alliance lounges when flying United or partners

other_benefits.name: Two Free Checked Bags
other_benefits.description: First 2 checked bags free for cardmember and companions on the same reservation (saves $80-160 round trip)

other_benefits.name: Premier Access
other_benefits.description: Full Premier Access travel services: priority check-in, security, boarding, and baggage handling

other_benefits.name: Global Entry/TSA PreCheck
other_benefits.description: Up to $120 credit for Global Entry or TSA PreCheck every 4 years

other_benefits.name: Award Flash Sales
other_benefits.description: Cardmember-only United MileagePlus award flash sales

other_benefits.name: Expanded Award Availability
other_benefits.description: Access to expanded United MileagePlus award availability

other_benefits.name: PQP Earnings
other_benefits.description: Earn up to 10,000 Premier Qualifying Points (PQP) per year (500 PQP per $12,000 spent)

notes: Ultra-premium United card with full United Club access ($650+ value alone). $695 AF (increased from $525 in 2025). Total annual credits (Instacart $300 + Streaming $120 + Rideshare $150 = $570) significantly offset the AF for those who use them. PQP earnings (up to 10,000/year) can fast-track United 1K elite status. Primary competitor is United Club Business Card. Both are essentially the same card (Club membership) — personal version vs business version.
